children.value:
These notes follow the historical path into quantum theory: from the puzzles of
classical physics through the birth of quantization, wave-particle duality, and the
Schrödinger equation, building toward the quantum description of atoms and molecules.

These notes are written to be read alongside lecture, and they contain runnable Python demos: move a slider and the plots recompute in your browser. Pages with the marimo button also open as editable notebooks. Computational projects live on the
carry the core theory, figures, and worked examples.
carry interactive Python you can run and modify right on the page.
are graded notebooks you complete in the cloud and submit on Canvas.

Ch 4: Vibrations and the harmonic oscillator
Weekly rhythm: homework covers the previous week’s lectures, and the four
are spaced roughly three weeks apart, due on Fridays of non-exam weeks.
